title: Morphling
description: Shapeshift into mobs. Each morph matches vanilla sounds, abilities, and animations.
body:
# 🫧 Morphling 🫧 [![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/morphling?color=24b47e&label=Downloads&style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white)](https://modrinth.com/mod/morphling) [![Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/morphling?color=white&labelColor=white&label=Version&style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=24b47e&color=24b47e)](https://modrinth.com/mod/morphling) [![Claude](https://img.shields.io/badge/Claude-D97757?style=for-the-badge&logo=none&label=Built%20with&color=D97757)](https://claude.ai/)
**Transform into the creatures of Minecraft. Press **`G`** to open the menu, click a mob, and become it.** Every morph gives you the mob's size, sounds, hitbox, attack damage, and a vanilla ability. Morphs and variant are saved per-world and restored automatically on rejoin. --- ![r](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a85d8f2ecd073eab1991577ff9bd3ae0bb86086b.gif) ## 🔮 Currently supported morphs - **Chicken** — slow fall, flap animation, **`R`** to lay an egg - **Cow / Pig** — peaceful walking forms - **Sheep** — press **`R`** to eat grass (turns grass to dirt, small heal + hunger restore) - **Parrot** — free-flight mode, imitate nearby hostile mobs, dance on the ground - **Creeper** — hold **`R`** to hiss and explode - **Skeleton** — press **`R`** to equip a bow with infinite arrows - **Enderman** — **`R`** to teleport, **`Shift+R`** to carry blocks, **`F`** to activate Angry Mode, takes damage in water and teleports to dry land - **Cat** — sit, lie down, hiss and purr sounds, creepers run from you - **Wolf** — sit, wet-shake animation, head tilt, angry state - **Zombie** — hold **`R`** at a wooden door to break it down - **Iron Golem** — attacks do arm-slam + knockback, cracks appear as HP drops, **`R`** to hold a poppy, **`B`** to repair (heals 1 heart, 10s cooldown) ##
🆕 See all - **🐬 Dolphin** — press **`R`** to splash jump, sprint underwater for speed boost, takes damage on land after drying out - **🐴 Horse** — **`R`** to rear up, **`Shift+R`** to eat grass (heals + restores hunger), gallop sounds, color + markings variants - **🧑‍🌾 Villager** — **`R`** unhappy, **`Shift+R`** sleep, **`Ctrl+R`** work sound, **`B`** hum, **`Shift+B`** yes, **`Ctrl+B`** celebrate, appearance variants - **🕷️ Spider** — walk into walls to climb, **`R`** to leap - **🟢 Slime** — bouncing movement, **`R`** big jump, contact damage, size variants, green FP tint - **🐝 Bee** — free-flight, **`R`** to sting (poisons target), **`Shift+R`** roll, **`B`** pollinate particles + sound, **`Shift+B`** nectar texture, **`F`** angry mode - **🦊 Fox** — sit, sleep, stalk crouch, pounce, screech sound, snow + red variants - **🐰 Rabbit** — hop movement, sit animation, color variants - **🦎 Axolotl** — breathes underwater, **`R`** to play dead (grants Regeneration), 5 color variants - **🐸 Frog** — breathes underwater, **`R`** to grab with tongue (pulls + damages), **`F`** to leap, **`B`** to croak, 3 variants - **🐻‍❄️ Polar Bear** — **`R`** to rear up on hind legs with warning roar - **🐼 Panda** — **`R`** sit, **`Shift+R`** roll, **`Ctrl+R`** lie on back, **`Shift+B`** sneeze, eating animation, 7 gene variants

> 💡 Press **[`B`]** while morphed to play that mob's ambient sound! ## 🎨 Variants Some morphs support visual variants — click the palette icon on a morph tile to customize its appearance. ## 🎮 Morph Games (BETA) `▫️NEW▫️` Play mini-games as morphs. Access via the Morph Menu. Includes **⚔️ Mob Brawl** (1v1 arena fights), **🎲 Morph Roulette**, and **🧠 Morph Trivia**. ⚠️ Known issue: [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) is incompatible with Mob Brawl arena maps — use "None" arena if DH is installed. ## ⌨️ Controls - **G** — Morph menu - **R** — Ability - **B** — Ambient sound - **F** — Angry mode (Enderman / Wolf / Bee) - **Shift+R / Ctrl+R / Shift+B / Ctrl+B** — Secondary abilities (varies by morph) - **Space** — Toggle flight (flying morphs) keybinds are remappable in Controls. ## 🐞 Report issues Found a bug? report any issues or suggest new mobs or mob abilities on the Modrinth issues page.
